summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FinFusion v2.0 data-driven rewrite. All backend APIs working with new {data, metadata, error} format. Frontend successfully renders backend-provided insights with no static text. InsightsEngine statistical reasoning validated.

design_issues.issue: Method label text is incomplete - shows 'Method:' without full description

passed_tests: GET /api/health returns {data: {ok: true, data_loaded: true}, metadata, error: null} ✅
GET /api/analytics/spending returns {data: {total_monthly, by_category, comparison: {previous_total, delta, delta_pct, direction}}, metadata: {current_period, previous_period}, error: null} ✅
GET /api/suggestions returns {data: [array of insight objects with type, metric, message, value, confidence], metadata: {insight_count}, error: null} ✅
Verified suggestions contain NO static/hardcoded text — each insight.message contains exact numeric values from insight.value ✅
Verified suggestions include month_comparison type with delta_pct ✅
Verified suggestions include top_category type with percentage ✅
Verified suggestions include spending_spike type with z-score based threshold ✅
Verified suggestions include trend type with slope_per_day ✅
Verified suggestions include forecast type with total_predicted ✅
GET /api/forecast/lstm returns {data: {forecast, total_predicted, trend, slope_per_day, avg_daily_30d}, metadata: {method_label, is_ml_model: false, confidence}, error: null} ✅
GET /api/budget/smart returns {data: {budget: [{category, limit, current, percentage, hist_mean, hist_std, months_of_data}], total}, metadata: {method_label, is_ml_model: false}, error: null} ✅
GET /api/expenses/anomalies returns {data: {alerts: [{amount, z_score, severity}], summary}, metadata: {method, threshold, mean, std}, error: null} ✅
POST /api/expenses with {amount, category, description, date} creates new expense and data changes on subsequent analytics call ✅
Frontend Dashboard loads and shows total spending from backend ✅
Frontend Dashboard shows month-over-month comparison from backend (no static '5% less' text) ✅
Frontend Insights section renders insight cards from /api/suggestions (no local computation) ✅
Frontend /budgets page shows hist_mean and hist_std from backend ✅
Frontend /forecast page shows method label, is_ml_model=false, confidence ✅
No static insight text like 'you saved 5%', 'slightly', 'more', 'less' without numbers ✅
All 15 insights contain numeric values and are data-driven ✅
Backend processes 9943 expenses from Kaggle dataset ✅
InsightsEngine statistical reasoning working correctly ✅
All API responses use consistent {data, metadata, error} shape ✅
